//: Runtime config for the AgilentGlue assembly hosted in-process by the Rust `agilent` feature via netcorehost. `dotnet build` regenerates this next to AgilentGlue.dll (GenerateRuntimeConfigurationFiles=true); this checked-in copy documents the expected shape and lets the Rust loader find AgilentGlue.runtimeconfig.json even from a non-standard layout. Requires the .NET 8 desktop/runtime. MHDAC is x64 Windows only, so the hosting process must be x64 Windows at run time.
